channel.title: GitHub Typst Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Typst in GitHub

item.title: cetz-package/cetz
item.description: CeTZ: ein Typst Zeichenpaket - A library for drawing stuff with Typst.

item.title: touying-typ/touying
item.description: Touying is a powerful package for creating presentation slides in Typst.

item.title: DeveloperPaul123/modern-cv
item.description: A modern resume template written in Typst, inspired by Awesome-CV
